prompt_preview:
You are a medical symptom normalization specialist. Your role is to extract and standardize medical symptoms from patient descriptions.

IMPORTANT: This is for MEDICAL EDUCATION only, not for clinical

primary_symptoms.name: Chest Pain
primary_symptoms.raw_text: sharp pain on the right side of my chest

secondary_symptoms.name: Pain Exacerbation with Deep Breathing
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: The pain gets worse when I try to take a deep breath

ambiguous_signals.clarification_needed: Are you experiencing any other symptoms related to your height or weight?

response.summary: Patient presents with sudden onset of severe sharp chest pain and shortness of breath, exacerbated by deep breathing.
